front: Eu tenho uma ideia para criar materiais educativos digitais.
pronunciation: ew TEYNG-yoo OO-mah ee-DAY-ah PAH-rah kry-AHR mah-teh-ree-AYS ee-doo-kah-CHEE-voos jee-zhee-TAYS.
back: I have an idea to create digital educational materials.
context: Expressing entrepreneurial intent in content production using 'materiais educativos'.

front: O objetivo do projeto é unificar diferentes mídias em um só lugar.
pronunciation: oo ob-zheh-CHEE-voo doo proo-ZHEH-too eh oo-nee-fee-KAHR jee-feh-REHN-chees MEE-dyahs ahyng oong soh loo-GAHR.
back: The objective of the project is to unify different media in one single place.
context: Describing system integration strategy via 'unificar mídias'.

front: Eu quero produzir cartões de memorização para venda comercial.
pronunciation: ew KEH-roo proo-doo-ZEER kahr-TOHNGS jee meh-moo-ree-zah-SOHNG PAH-rah VEHN-dah koo-mehr-SYAW.
back: I want to produce flashcards for commercial sale.
context: Detailing business product specs; 'cartões de memorização' is the formal term for flashcards.

front: Como funciona o fluxo de trabalho para exportar os arquivos?
pronunciation: KOH-moo foon-syo-NAH oo FLOOK-soo jee trah-BAH-lyoo PAH-rah eyks-pohr-TAHR ooz ahr-KEE-voos?
back: How does the workflow for exporting files work?
context: Querying operational design models via 'fluxo de trabalho' (workflow).

front: Eu preciso associar um arquivo de áudio à frente do cartão.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo ah-soo-sy-AHR oong ahr-KEE-voo jee OW-zhoo ah FREHN-chee doo kahr-TOHNG.
back: I need to associate an audio file with the front of the card.
context: Mapping multimedia parameters to specific flashcard component zones.

front: O design visual precisa ser limpo e atraente para os alunos.
pronunciation: oo deez-AYNG vee-zoo-AW prah-SEE-zoo sayr LEEYM-poo ee ah-trah-EHN-chee PAH-rah ooz ah-LOO-noos.
back: The visual design needs to be clean and attractive for the students.
context: Stating UI presentation benchmarks for student users ('alunos').

front: Esta ferramenta facilita a criação de conteúdo em lote.
pronunciation: EHS-tah feh-hah-MEHN-tah fah-see-LEE-tah ah kry-ah-SOHNG jee kohn-teh-OO-doo ahyng LOH-chee.
back: This tool facilitates batch content creation.
context: Discussing production scalability parameters using 'em lote' (in batch).

front: Nós podemos inserir imagens explicativas no verso do cartão.
pronunciation: nohs poo-DEH-moos een-seh-REER ee-MAH-zheeyngs eyks-plee-kah-CHEE-vahs noo VEHR-soo doo kahr-TOHNG.
back: We can insert explanatory images on the back of the card.
context: Explaining deck structure layout locations ('verso' means back/reverse side).

front: Eu uso uma planilha para organizar o texto antes da importação.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo OO-mah plah-NEEL-yah PAH-rah oohr-gah-nee-ZAHR oo TEHKS-too AHN-chees dah eeym-pohr-tah-SOHNG.
back: I use a spreadsheet to organize the text before importing.
context: Describing data preparation workflows using 'planilha' (spreadsheet).

front: O método de repetição espaçada ajuda na retenção a longo prazo.
pronunciation: oo MEH-too-doo jee heh-peh-chee-SOHNG ees-pah-SAH-dah ah-ZHOO-dah nah heh-tehn-SOHNG ah LOONG-goo PRAH-zoo.
back: The spaced repetition method helps with long-term retention.
context: Explaining educational cognitive algorithms via 'repetição espaçada'.

front: Como posso proteger os direitos autorais do meu material?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo proo-teh-ZHEHR ooz jee-RAY-toos ow-too-RAYS doo mew mah-teh-ree-AW?
back: How can I protect the copyright of my material?
context: Inquiring about legal/intellectual asset safeguards using 'direitos autorais'.

front: O aplicativo permite sincronizar o progresso entre dispositivos.
pronunciation: oo ah-plee-kah-CHEE-voo pehr-MEE-chee seeyng-croo-nee-ZAHR oo proo-GREHS-oo eeyn-tree dees-poo-zee-CHEE-voos.
back: The app allows syncing progress between devices.
context: Describing data continuity architecture traits using 'sincronizar progresso'.

front: Eu dividi o conteúdo didático em pequenas partes fáceis de digerir.
pronunciation: ew jee-vee-JEE oo kohn-teh-OO-doo jee-DAH-chee-koo ahyng peh-KEH-nahs PAHR-chees FAH-sees jee jee-zheh-REER.
back: I divided the didactic content into small pieces that are easy to digest.
context: Discussing microlearning instructional design formatting micro-steps.

front: Qual plataforma você recomenda para hospedar e vender o produto?
pronunciation: kwaw plah-tah-FOHR-mah voh-SEH heh-koo-MEHN-dah PAH-rah oos-peh-DAHR ee vehn-DEHR oo proo-DOO-too?
back: Which platform do you recommend to host and sell the product?
context: Inquiring about e-commerce hosting targets via 'hospedar e vender'.

front: Eu passei o dia editando os clipes de áudio para o projeto.
pronunciation: ew pah-SAY oo JEE-ah ee-jee-TAHN-doo ooz KLEE-pees jee OW-zhoo PAH-rah oo proo-ZHEH-too.
back: I spent the day editing the audio clips for the project.
context: Describing multimedia asset prep pipelines using 'editando'.

front: É importante validar o produto com um pequeno grupo de usuários.
pronunciation: eh eeym-pohr-TAHN-chee vah-lee-DAHR oo proo-DOO-too koong oong peh-KEH-noo GROO-poo jee oo-zoo-AH-ryoos.
back: It is important to validate the product with a small group of users.
context: Advocating for beta-testing product validations via 'grupo de usuários'.

front: O formato final do arquivo deve ser compatível com sistemas mobile.
pronunciation: oo fohr-MAH-too fee-NAW doo ahr-KEE-voo DEH-vee sayr kohm-pah-CHEE-vew koong sees-TEH-mahs mobile.
back: The final file format must be compatible with mobile systems.
context: Stating cross-platform runtime operational boundaries.

front: Eu quero focar no nicho de aprendizado de idiomas.
pronunciation: ew KEH-roo foo-KAHR noo NEE-shoo jee ah-prehn-jee-ZAH-doo jee ee-jee-OH-mahs.
back: I want to focus on the language learning niche.
context: Defining market segmentation strategy using 'nicho' and 'aprendizado de idiomas'.

front: Como posso configurar o estilo dos cartões usando CSS?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo kohn-fee-goo-RAHR oo ees-CHEE-loo doos kahr-TOHNGS oo-ZAHN-doo CSS?
back: How can I configure the style of the cards using CSS?
context: Querying structural visual styling mechanisms for digital flashcard objects.

front: Esse pacote digital vai incluir cem cartões interativos.
pronunciation: EHS-ee pah-COH-chee jee-zhee-TAW vy een-cloo-EER seeyng kahr-TOHNGS eeyn-tehr-ah-CHEE-voos.
back: This digital pack will include one hundred interactive cards.
context: Stating digital inventory contents using 'cartões interativos'.

front: A clareza dos exemplos determina a qualidade do material.
pronunciation: ah klah-REH-zah doos eyks-EHM-ploos jeh-tehr-MEE-nah ah kwah-lee-DAH-jee doo mah-teh-ree-AW.
back: The clarity of the examples determines the quality of the material.
context: Stating pedagogical content quality parameters via 'clareza dos exemplos'.

front: Eu pretendo automatizar a geração dos arquivos de áudio.
pronunciation: ew prah-TEHN-doo ow-too-mah-chee-ZAHR ah zheh-rah-SOHNG doos ahr-KEE-voos jee OW-zhoo.
back: I plan to automate the generation of the audio files.
context: Discussing Text-to-Speech (TTS) optimization workflows via 'geração de áudio'.

front: O cliente recebe o link para baixar o material na hora.
pronunciation: oo klee-EHN-chee heh-SEE-bee oo leeyng-kee PAH-rah by-SHAHR oo mah-teh-ree-AW nah OH-rah.
back: The customer receives the link to download the material instantly.
context: Describing post-purchase automated fulfillment flows via 'baixar o material'.

front: Nós precisamos revisar a ortografia antes de publicar o deck.
pronunciation: nohs prah-see-ZAH-moos heh-vee-ZAHR ah oohr-too-grah-FEE-ah AHN-chees jee poo-blee-KAHR oo deck.
back: We need to proofread the spelling before publishing the deck.
context: Stating linguistic QA steps; 'deck' is widely used as a loanword in flashcard contexts.

front: Eu estou mapeando os conceitos mais difíceis para os estudantes.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY mah-peh-AHN-doo ooz kohn-SAY-toos mays jee-FEE-sees PAH-rah ooz ees-too-DAHN-chees.
back: I am mapping out the most difficult concepts for the students.
context: Targeting high-value study pain points using the gerund 'mapeando'.

front: Este software permite converter texto em fala com som natural.
pronunciation: EHS-chee software pehr-MEE-chee kohn-vehr-TEHR TEHKS-too ahyng FAH-lah koong soong nah-too-RAW.
back: This software allows converting text to speech with a natural sound.
context: Describing speech synthesis tools using 'converter texto em fala'.

front: O marketing digital é essencial para alcançar o público certo.
pronunciation: oo marketing jee-zhee-TAW eh eh-seehyn-SYAW PAH-rah aw-kahn-SAHR oo POO-blee-koo SEHR-too.
back: Digital marketing is essential to reach the right audience.
context: Discussing distribution strategies using 'alcançar o público certo'.

front: Eu criei um modelo padrão para manter a identidade visual.
pronunciation: ew kry-AY oong moo-DEH-loo pah-DROHNG PAH-rah mah-TEHR ah ee-dehn-chee-DAH-jee vee-zoo-AW.
back: I created a default template to maintain the visual identity.
context: Ensuring brand consistency across products using 'modelo padrão' (template).

front: Os usuários preferem baixar pacotes compactados para poupar tempo.
pronunciation: ooz oo-zoo-AH-ryoos preh-FEH-reeyng by-SHAHR pah-COH-chees kohm-pak-TAH-doos PAH-rah pow-PAHR TEHMP-oo.
back: Users prefer to download zipped/compressed packages to save time.
context: Discussing asset distribution architecture optimizations ('pacotes compactados').

front: Como funciona o sistema de comissão dessas plataformas de vendas?
pronunciation: KOH-moo foon-syo-NAH oo sees-TEH-mah jee coo-mee-SOHNG DEHS-ahs plah-tah-FOHR-mahs jee VEHN-dahs?
back: How does the commission system of these sales platforms work?
context: Analyzing marketplace cost margins via 'sistema de comissão'.

front: Minha intenção é gerar uma fonte de renda extra estável.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah een-tehn-SOHNG eh zheh-RAHR OO-mah FOHNT-ee jee HEHYN-dah EHKS-trah ees-TAH-vew.
back: My intention is to generate a stable source of extra income.
context: Stating side-business commercial goals using 'fonte de renda extra'.

front: Eu configurei tags para categorizar os cartões por nível de dificuldade.
pronunciation: ew kohn-fee-goo-RAY tags PAH-rah kah-teh-goo-ree-ZAHR ooz kahr-TOHNGS poor NEE-vew jee jee-fee-koow-DAH-jee.
back: I set up tags to categorize the cards by difficulty level.
context: Discussing metadata taxonomic sorting models using 'categorizar por nível'.

front: A experiência do usuário deve ser fluida e sem travamentos.
pronunciation: ah eyks-peh-ree-EHN-syah doo oo-zoo-AH-ryoo DEH-vee sayr FLOO-ee-dah ee sayng trah-vah-MEHN-toos.
back: The user experience must be fluid and without freezes/lag.
context: Praising layout runtime stability via 'experiência do usuário' (UX).

front: Eu passei a tarde estruturando o banco de dados dos cartões.
pronunciation: ew pah-SAY ah TAHR-jee ees-troo-too-RAHN-doo oo BAHN-koo jee DAH-doos doos kahr-TOHNGS.
back: I spent the afternoon structuring the database for the cards.
context: Describing backend asset relations using the past progressive setup 'passei a tarde estruturando'.

front: Estou pronto para lançar a primeira versão do meu produto digital.
pronunciation: ees-TOY PROHN-too PAH-rah lahn-SAHR ah pree-MAY-rah vehr-SOHNG doo mew proo-DOO-too jee-zhee-TAW.
back: I am ready to launch the first version of my digital product.
context: Celebrating MVP product rollouts. Female speakers use 'pronta'.
